NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-22-2011 AT 3:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 611. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAY-09-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-24-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF GENERAL SERVICES' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED CONTRACT INTERPRETATION IS NOT UNREASONABLE AND THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT THAT PLAINTIFF WOULD NOT BE ENTITLED TO RELIEF. GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-09-2011 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-14-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. APR-13-2011 MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-09-2011 - BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-22-2011 - BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
